subcodes.title: Address to Free Religious Association of Boston, Ford Hall, 1912-05-25
subcodes.first_line: The divine religions have been revealed for the purpose of fostering love among humankind, to engender fellowship, and to achieve the unity of the world [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ادیان الهیه بجهت محبت بین بشر نازل شده بجهت الفت نازل شده بجهه وحدت عالم
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @harmony of science and religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah
